LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO NOV-07-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DISMISSAL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6 AND ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CONDITIONAL STIPULATED [SIC]" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Continued To Dec-12-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure 664.6 and enter judgment pursuant to conditional stipulated [sic]" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
